C[Tequila Bob: Another tactic is to practice ""life-and-death"" problems.
C[Tequila Bob: Sometimes they are just called ""go problems"", but basically they present a stone formation and ask you to either make it live or kill it.
C[Tequila Bob: That way, you learn alot about common shapes and situations.
C[Tequila Bob: They are all over. There's some apps for iPhone and Android, and I think there's a site called go-problems.com or something like that.
